# ClearSight

> ADA/WCAG 2.1 accessibility checker — full-site crawl and scan for WCAG Level A & AA violations with AI-enriched reports.

ClearSight is an open-source web accessibility auditing tool. It scans websites for WCAG 2.1 Level A and AA violations using headless Chromium and axe-core, enriches findings with AI-generated descriptions and fix suggestions, and provides detailed reports with scores, severity levels, and export options.

## Features

- Single-page scan and full-site crawl
- WCAG 2.1 Level A & AA coverage via axe-core
- AI-enriched issue descriptions and fix suggestions
- Accessibility score (0–100) with severity-weighted penalties
- PDF and Excel report export
- Chrome extension for one-click scanning
- Self-hostable via Docker

## Docs

- Documentation: https://docs.clearsight.pranaygupta.in
- Self-hosting guide: https://docs.clearsight.pranaygupta.in/dev/self-hosting
- API reference: https://docs.clearsight.pranaygupta.in/dev/api
